restaurant.name: Cardamom House
restaurant.tagline: Slow brunch. Strong coffee. Lisbon, since 2021.

today_special.blurb: Chef's pick today: our Saffron French Toast with cardamom syrup.

categories.name: Brunch
categories.description: Served all day. Local eggs, slow-cooked everything.

items.name: Shakshuka
items.description: Two eggs poached in spiced tomato and pepper sauce, served with sourdough.

items.name: Avocado Toast
items.description: Smashed avocado, lemon, chili flakes, hemp seeds, soft poached egg.

items.name: Full Lisbon Breakfast
items.description: Eggs your way, chorizo, grilled tomato, beans, sourdough, salted butter.

items.name: Acai Bowl
items.description: Acai, banana, granola, blueberries, honey, coconut.

items.name: Bircher Muesli
items.description: Oats soaked overnight in apple juice with cinnamon, apple, almonds, yogurt.

items.name: Eggs Benedict
items.description: Two poached eggs, smoked salmon or ham, hollandaise, on toasted muffins.

items.name: Saffron French Toast
items.description: Brioche soaked in saffron-cardamom custard, pistachios, mascarpone, honey.

items.name: Veggie Hash
items.description: Sweet potato, kale, peppers, two eggs, smoked paprika, avocado.

categories.name: Sandwiches & Toasties
categories.description: Served on house sourdough or rye.

items.name: Croque Monsieur
items.description: Ham, gruyere, béchamel, mustard, on grilled sourdough.

items.name: Mushroom Melt
items.description: Garlic mushrooms, taleggio, truffle oil, rocket, on rye.

items.name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
items.description: Cream cheese, dill, capers, red onion, smoked salmon.

items.name: Tuna Crunch
items.description: Tuna, celery, cornichons, mayo, lettuce, on sourdough.

items.name: Halloumi & Harissa
items.description: Grilled halloumi, harissa mayo, slaw, rocket, on sourdough.

categories.name: Drinks
categories.description: All coffee is single-origin from Reverb Roasters, Porto.

items.name: Cardamom Latte
items.description: House blend, cardamom syrup, milk of your choice.

items.name: Matcha
items.description: Stone-ground Uji matcha, milk of your choice.
